overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a soldier in tactical gear walking through a rural Latin American town with red dirt roads and mixed wooden and concrete architecture. The character approaches an intersection, waits for traffic with a pedestrian, and crosses the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved village street with wooden sheds and brick walls

events.description: passing a woman in a long green dress walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt roadside past weathered wooden buildings and stone walls

notable_agents.action: woman in a long green dress walking along the sidewalk in the opposite direction

entered.detail: weathered wooden building with corrugated metal roof and blue trim
rusty corrugated metal fencing along the property line
two-story brick building with white window frames and red base
tall palm trees lining the street against the mountain backdrop

segments.scene_description: Walking along a curved dirt street lined with wooden sheds and brick walls. The camera passes a woman in a green dress walking the opposite way, with palm trees and mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with multi-story apartment buildings

events.description: stopping at the crosswalk to wait for approaching traffic
a woman in a purple top and hat joins waiting at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk waiting for traffic to clear, occasionally looking around at passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: woman in purple top and green skirt standing at the crosswalk waiting to cross
dark sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: three-story green painted concrete apartment building with balconies
tall red-orange apartment building with multiple windows and satellite dishes
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt road
overhead electrical wires crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: Stopped at an urban intersection with green and red apartment buildings visible. A woman in a purple top joins the wait at the crosswalk as cars pass through the intersection. The camera remains stationary, observing the light traffic.

events.description: beginning to cross the street at the crosswalk alongside the waiting pedestrian

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk alongside the woman in purple, moving from the near sidewalk to the far side

notable_agents.action: woman in purple top walking alongside across the crosswalk

entered.detail: concrete sidewalk and curb on the far side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: Crossing the asphalt intersection via the white-striped crosswalk, walking alongside the woman in purple. The green and red apartment buildings recede into the background as the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rustic dirt road into a bustling urban intersection. It begins by gliding along a curved red dirt street lined with wooden sheds and brick walls, passing a woman in a green dress while palm trees and distant mountains frame the horizon. As the camera reaches the edge of the town, the terrain shifts to asphalt where it comes to a halt at a crosswalk, observing light traffic and colorful green and red apartment buildings. The scene then transitions into motion as the camera crosses the white-striped intersection alongside a woman in a purple top, leaving the vibrant buildings behind while moving toward the opposite sidewalk.
